license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.72bhqan
title: Toehold switch assembly
author: Junyan Qian

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare 4 effendorfs label them, each one will contain the master mix of a certain toehold primer. Attention: Keep the polymerase on ice avoiding denaturation. (Order of pipetting: H 2 O -> Q5 MasterMix -> primers) %s %s MM5 Volume25 Reference (25 uL)Per tubeMaster mix1Master mix2Master mix3Master mix4pJL1-sfGFP-2(~60ng/uL)11 sfGFP_fwd1.251.256.256.256.256.25Toehold_BN_1.1(10uM)1.251.256.25 Toehold_BN_1.2(10uM) 6.25 Toehold_BN_1.3(10uM) 6.25 Toehold_BN_1.4(10uM) 6.25dNTPs (10 mM)\\\\\\Q5 Reaction Buffer (5X)\\\\\\Q5 MasterMix12.512.562.562.562.562.5H2O9945454545Total2525120120120120
Pipette up and down mix the master mix thoroughly.
Take 20 PCR tubes label them, pipette 24 μl of the master mix into the tubes accordingly.
Add 1 μl of DNA template into each PCR tubes

PCR machine setting: Calculate the reaction temperature according to the primer sequence using NEB online Tm calculator: http://tmcalculator.neb.com/#!/main %s %s TemplateFw PrimerRev PrimerLengthElongation timeTm - Q5Tm - PhusionTm usedpJL1-sfGFPsfGFP_fwdpriIGEMEPFL057Toehold_BN_1.1 95830s67/68(68) 68pJL1-sfGFPsfGFP_fwdpriIGEMEPFL057Toehold_BN_1.2 95830s67/68(68) 68pJL1-sfGFPsfGFP_fwdpriIGEMEPFL057Toehold_BN_1.3 95830s67/68(68) 68pJL1-sfGFPsfGFP_fwdpriIGEMEPFL057Toehold_BN_1.4 95830s67/68(68) 68
Thermo cycle setting: %s %s STEPTEMPTIMEInitial Denaturation98°C30 seconds25–35 Cycles98°C5–10 seconds*50–72°C10–30 seconds72°C20–30 seconds/kbFinal Extension72°C2 minutesHold4–10°C
